text: Inside these glass and steel surroundings, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The clean, modern lines of the space evoke order, yet the silence is dense with potential. As I step into the vibrant exhibit space decorated with 'R+D,' my spirit shifts—here, innovation and thought are on display. The air tingles with energy, and the words on the walls invite me to reflect deeply on humanity’s relationship with technology. I feel both an observer and participant, part of this dialogue between past hopes and future possibilities.
